scripts.version:sync: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));const confPath='src-tauri/tauri.conf.json';const conf=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(confPath,'utf8'));conf.version=pkg.version;fs.writeFileSync(confPath,JSON.stringify(conf,null,2)+'\n');const cargoPath='src-tauri/Cargo.toml';const cargo=fs.readFileSync(cargoPath,'utf8').replace(/^(version\s*=\s*)\"[^\"]+\"/m,(_,prefix)=>prefix+'\"'+pkg.version+'\"');fs.writeFileSync(cargoPath,cargo);" && cargo update --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -p app
